name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-2
title: Migrate all .sh scripts to pure Python; establish Python as the sole scripting tech stack
description: All shell scripts (.sh files) in rabbit-cage (hooks/, scripts/) and across all features shall be rewritten as standalone Python scripts. Bash is to be removed as a runtime dependency. Rationale: Python offers consistent cross-platform behavior, better string handling (avoiding the quoting and newline edge cases that produced BUG-3), testability without subprocess, and a single language across the entire codebase. Scope: hooks/sync-check.sh, hooks/scope-guard.sh, hooks/session-init.sh, hooks/refresh.sh, scripts/build.sh, scripts/generate-claude-md.sh, scripts/scope-guard-on.sh, and all equivalent scripts in other features. Each converted script should be an executable Python file (#!/usr/bin/env python3) with the same contract (stdin/stdout/exit codes) as the shell original. The build-contract.json copy-file targets and settings.json hook commands reference these by path and must be updated accordingly. Invariant 39 (all Python logic in standalone .py helpers) becomes the whole-script rule, not just the embedded-logic rule.
